goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should 'leave after 08:30'.
The train should depart from 'birmingham new street' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should leave after 08:30
The train should depart from birmingham new street and should go to cambridge
